hero.title: See what's behind the post.
hero.subtitle: AI-powered context notes for social media.
hero.subtitleLine2: One click. Real sources. No bias.
hero.demoTweet: OpenAI just confirmed GPT-5 will replace 80% of jobs by 2026!
hero.demoContextBody: This claim is misleading. OpenAI has not made such a statement. The "80%" figure comes from a misquoted Goldman Sachs report, which estimated AI could affect certain tasks — not eliminate jobs entirely. Multiple economists have pushed back on this interpretation.

comparatif.unlikeGrokDesc: Unbiased — uses external sources, not platform data
comparatif.unlikeCNDesc: Instant — context in seconds, not days
comparatif.unlikeManualDesc: One click — no tabs, no context switching

platforms.title: Works on your favorite platforms
platforms.comingSoon: Firefox and Safari support coming soon.

byok.title: Your keys. Your models. Your data.
byok.description: Contexly uses your own API keys — nothing passes through our servers except to fetch context. Bring your Claude, GPT, or Gemini key.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Contexly is a browser extension that adds a "Context" button to social media posts. Click it, and you get a short context note with verified sources — like a private Community Note, but instant.
faq.a2: BYOK stands for "Bring Your Own Key". Contexly uses your own API keys (Claude, GPT, Gemini) to generate context. This means your data stays under your control and you only pay for what you use.
faq.a3: Yes. Your API keys are stored locally in your browser and never sent to our servers. Post content is processed through our backend only to fetch context, and is not stored beyond a temporary anonymous cache (72h).
faq.a4: X.com (Twitter), Bluesky, and LinkedIn are supported today. Firefox and Safari support is coming soon.
faq.a5: Contexly generates context notes in 7 languages: English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, German, Japanese, and Chinese. You can change the language in the extension settings.
faq.a6: Contexly is free. You pay only for your own API usage (typically $0.001–0.01 per explanation with Claude Haiku/Sonnet). A free tier with no API keys required is coming soon.
faq.q7: Where do the sources come from?
faq.a7: Sources come from the LLM provider's native web search (Anthropic or OpenAI) — never invented by the AI model. Every [1], [2] reference links to a real, verifiable web page. This is how we prevent hallucinated URLs.

footer.tagline: Contexly — See what's behind the post.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: Contexly is a browser extension that provides AI-generated context notes for social media posts. We respect your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it.
privacy.dataApiKeysDesc: Stored locally in your browser (chrome.storage.local). Never sent to our servers.
privacy.dataPostContentDesc: When you click "Context", the post text and metadata are sent to our backend to generate context. We do not store post content beyond the cache duration (72h).
privacy.dataCacheDesc: We cache context results (keyed by URL hash, not content) for up to 72h to reduce latency and API costs. Cache entries are anonymous — no user identifier is attached.
privacy.dataNoTrackingDesc: We don't require accounts, don't use cookies, and don't track you across sites.
privacy.thirdPartyLLMDesc: Your API key is used to call the LLM provider you selected. Web search is performed natively by the LLM provider (Anthropic web search tool or OpenAI web search) to find sources — no separate search service is used. Their privacy policies apply to those API calls.
privacy.thirdPartyCFDesc: Our backend runs on Cloudflare. Cloudflare's privacy policy applies to infrastructure.
privacy.dataFlowDesc: When you click "Context" on a post, the extension extracts the post text, author, and URL from the page. This data is sent to our backend (a Cloudflare Worker), which calls your chosen LLM provider (using your API key) with native web search enabled to generate a context note with verified sources. The result is returned to the extension and displayed in the side panel.
privacy.localDataDesc: The following data never leaves your browser:
privacy.localData2: Your preferences (language, LLM provider, model, detail level, tone)
privacy.localData3: A local cache of recent context results (24h TTL, max 100 entries)
privacy.localData4: Your history of analyzed posts (max 50 entries)
privacy.transmittedDesc: The following data is sent to external services when you click "Context":
privacy.transmitted1: Post text, author, and URL are sent to our backend (Cloudflare Worker) to generate the context note.
privacy.transmitted2: The LLM provider performs a native web search to find relevant sources (no separate search service is used).
privacy.transmitted3: The LLM generates the context note using the post content and its web search results, all within a single API call via our backend.
privacy.notCollected3: No browsing history beyond explicitly analyzed posts
privacy.notCollected4: No data is sold or shared with third parties
privacy.storageText: All user settings (API keys, language preference) are stored locally in chrome.storage.local. Server-side cache uses Cloudflare KV. Cache entries contain only the context note and source URLs, keyed by a SHA-256 hash of the post URL. No personally identifiable information is stored.
privacy.rightsText: You can clear all local data by removing the extension. Cache entries expire automatically after 72 hours.
privacy.changesText: We may update this policy. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceText: By installing Contexly, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the extension.
terms.descriptionText: Contexly is a browser extension that provides AI-generated context notes for social media posts using your own API keys (BYOK — Bring Your Own Key).
terms.responsibility1: You provide and are responsible for your own API keys and any costs incurred with third-party providers.
terms.responsibility2: You agree not to use Contexly for illegal purposes or to circumvent platform terms of service.
terms.responsibility3: You understand that context notes are AI-generated and may contain inaccuracies.
terms.warrantyText: Contexly is provided "as is". We do not guarantee accuracy, availability, or fitness for any purpose.
terms.liabilityText: We are not liable for costs incurred through your API keys, inaccurate context notes, or any damages arising from use of the extension.
terms.ipText: Contexly and its brand are our property. Context notes generated using your API keys are not claimed by us.
terms.terminationText: We may discontinue the service at any time. You may stop using it at any time by uninstalling the extension.
terms.changesTosText: We may update these terms. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.lawText: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of France.
